name: Classic Tomato Pasta
steps: Boil pasta until al dente.
Sauté garlic in olive oil for 1 min.
Add chopped tomatoes, cook 10 min.
Toss pasta in sauce.
Top with fresh basil and serve.

name: Garlic Butter Shrimp
steps: Melt butter in a pan over medium heat.
Add minced garlic and sauté 1 min.
Add shrimp, cook 2 min per side.
Squeeze lemon juice and toss.
Garnish with parsley and serve.

name: Veggie Fried Rice
steps: Cook rice and let it cool.
Scramble eggs in a wok, set aside.
Stir-fry carrot and onion 3 min.
Add garlic, then rice, then eggs.
Season with soy sauce and serve hot.

name: Avocado Toast
steps: Toast bread slices to your liking.
Mash avocado with lemon juice.
Season with salt and pepper.
Spread avocado on toast.
Serve immediately.

name: Spinach Omelette
steps: Beat eggs with salt in a bowl.
Melt butter in a non-stick pan.
Pour eggs and swirl to coat.
Add spinach and cheese on one half.
Fold and cook 1 more minute.

name: Potato Soup
steps: Dice potatoes and onion.
Sauté onion and garlic in butter.
Add potatoes and cover with water.
Simmer 15 min until tender.
Blend smooth with milk, season and serve.

name: Chicken Stir-Fry
steps: Slice chicken into thin strips.
Heat oil in a wok on high heat.
Stir-fry chicken 4 min until cooked.
Add broccoli, garlic, ginger and stir.
Pour soy sauce, toss and serve with rice.

name: Mushroom Risotto
steps: Sauté onion and garlic in butter.
Add rice and toast 2 min.
Add mushrooms and stir.
Gradually add hot water, stirring constantly.
Finish with parmesan and serve.

name: Banana Pancakes
steps: Mash banana in a bowl.
Add eggs, flour, and milk and mix.
Heat butter in a pan on medium.
Pour small rounds of batter.
Cook 2 min per side until golden.

name: Tomato Egg Scramble
steps: Dice tomato and onion.
Beat eggs with a pinch of salt.
Stir-fry onion in oil 2 min.
Add tomato and cook 3 min.
Pour in eggs, scramble until cooked.

name: Garlic Roasted Potatoes
steps: Preheat oven to 220°C.
Cut potatoes into wedges.
Toss with garlic, oil, salt, pepper, rosemary.
Spread on baking tray.
Roast 30–35 min until golden.

name: Caprese Salad
steps: Slice tomatoes and mozzarella evenly.
Alternate slices on a plate.
Tuck basil leaves between each slice.
Drizzle with olive oil.
Season with salt and serve.

name: Lemon Herb Chicken
steps: Marinate chicken with lemon, garlic, olive oil, rosemary.
Rest 15 min.
Heat pan on medium-high.
Cook chicken 6–7 min per side.
Rest 5 min before slicing.

name: French Toast
steps: Whisk eggs, milk, sugar, and cinnamon.
Dip bread slices in the mixture.
Heat butter in a pan on medium.
Cook bread 2–3 min per side until golden.
Serve with syrup or fruit.

name: Beef Tacos
steps: Brown ground beef in a pan.
Season with salt, pepper, cumin.
Warm taco shells in oven 3 min.
Fill with beef, tomato, cheese, onion.
Squeeze lime on top and serve.

name: Minestrone Soup
steps: Dice all vegetables.
Sauté onion, garlic, carrot, celery in oil.
Add tomatoes and beans, stir.
Pour in 4 cups water or broth.
Add pasta and cook 10 min. Season and serve.

name: Pesto Pasta
steps: Blend basil, garlic, parmesan, pine nuts, olive oil into pesto.
Boil pasta until al dente.
Drain pasta, reserve a little water.
Toss pasta with pesto.
Add pasta water if too thick. Serve.

name: Cheese Quesadilla
steps: Dice onion and pepper.
Sauté onion and pepper in butter 3 min.
Lay tortilla flat in a pan on medium heat.
Add cheese and sautéed veg on one half.
Fold and cook 2 min per side until golden.

name: Lentil Dhal
steps: Rinse lentils thoroughly.
Sauté onion, garlic, ginger in oil.
Add tomato and spices, cook 3 min.
Add lentils and 3 cups water.
Simmer 20 min until soft. Season and serve.

name: Greek Salad
steps: Chop tomato, cucumber, and onion.
Combine in a large bowl.
Add olives and crumbled feta.
Drizzle with olive oil.
Toss gently and serve.

name: Spaghetti Carbonara
steps: Boil pasta until al dente.
Fry bacon and garlic until crispy.
Mix eggs and parmesan in a bowl.
Remove pan from heat, add pasta.
Stir in egg mixture quickly. Season with pepper.

name: Mango Smoothie
steps: Peel and chop mango and banana.
Add to blender with milk and honey.
Add ice cubes.
Blend until smooth.
Pour into glasses and serve cold.

name: Salmon with Lemon
steps: Season salmon with salt and pepper.
Melt butter in a pan on medium-high.
Cook salmon 4 min per side.
Add garlic and lemon juice, baste.
Garnish with dill and serve.

name: Corn Fritters
steps: Mix corn, egg, flour, onion, salt into a batter.
Heat oil in a frying pan.
Drop spoonfuls of batter and flatten.
Fry 2–3 min per side until golden.
Drain on paper towel and serve.

name: Broccoli Cheddar Soup
steps: Sauté onion and garlic in butter.
Add chopped broccoli and cover with water.
Simmer 10 min until tender.
Blend until smooth.
Stir in cheddar and milk, season and serve.

name: Shakshuka
steps: Sauté onion and garlic in olive oil.
Add tomatoes, cumin, paprika. Cook 8 min.
Make wells in sauce and crack in eggs.
Cover and cook until whites are set.
Serve with bread.

name: Tofu Stir-Fry
steps: Press and cube tofu.
Fry tofu in oil until golden, set aside.
Stir-fry garlic and ginger 1 min.
Add broccoli and cook 3 min.
Return tofu, add soy sauce, toss and serve.

name: Apple Cinnamon Oatmeal
steps: Peel and dice apple.
Combine oats and milk in a pot.
Cook on medium, stirring, 5 min.
Stir in apple and cinnamon.
Drizzle with honey and serve.

name: Chicken Caesar Salad
steps: Grill or pan-cook chicken, slice thinly.
Tear lettuce into a large bowl.
Add croutons and parmesan.
Toss with lemon juice and garlic.
Top with chicken and serve.

name: Coconut Curry
steps: Sauté onion, garlic, ginger in oil.
Add chicken and brown 5 min.
Stir in curry powder and tomato.
Pour in coconut milk and simmer 15 min.
Adjust seasoning and serve with rice.

name: Bean and Cheese Burrito
steps: Warm beans in a pan with salt.
Warm tortilla in a dry pan 30 sec.
Layer beans, cheese, onion, tomato.
Squeeze lime juice.
Roll tightly and serve.

name: Leek and Potato Gratin
steps: Preheat oven to 180°C.
Slice potato and leek thinly.
Layer in buttered baking dish with garlic.
Pour cream over and top with cheese.
Bake 40 min until golden and tender.

name: Prawn Fried Noodles
steps: Cook noodles, drain and set aside.
Stir-fry garlic in oil 1 min.
Add shrimp and cook 2 min.
Push aside, scramble egg.
Add noodles, soy sauce, spring onion, toss and serve.

name: Stuffed Bell Peppers
steps: Preheat oven to 190°C.
Cut tops off peppers, remove seeds.
Cook rice and mix with browned beef, tomato, onion.
Fill peppers with the mixture.
Top with cheese and bake 25 min.

name: Egg Fried Rice
steps: Day-old cold rice works best.
Heat oil in a wok on high heat.
Add garlic, then push aside and scramble eggs.
Add rice and break up clumps.
Add soy sauce and spring onion, toss and serve.
